title: Yijing Hexagram 14: Da You (Possession in Great Measure)
description: Hexagram 14 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 14 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Possession in Great Measure. Supreme success. Fire in heaven above. The superior man curbs evil and furthers good.
